label: Alerts
description: Recent critical and high-severity alerts with severity badges, entity context, and quick-action links.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: 'No active alerts' message was already present.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass on first inspection — no fixes required.

1.3.note: getAlertsForScope(organizationIds, clientIds, strategyIds) narrows alert set per org.

1.4.note: getAlertsForScope takes clientIds and narrows accordingly.

1.6.note: Empty arrays in getAlertsForScope return full alert dataset.

1.7.note: Alert seed data in lib/mocks/fixtures; no fixture constants embedded in widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time alerts), batch ✓ (historical alerts for asOfDatetime), paper ✓ (display-only). Widget is read-only alert preview.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(); alerts filtered via getAlertsForScope with scope params.

3.3.note: Human check: no order entry; display-only.

3.4.note: Human check: no explicit mode indicator in this widget.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget renders alerts from context regardless of mode — display-only.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in AlertsPreviewWidget section.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: 'View All' Button wrapped in Link to /services/trading/alerts. Alert row Links also navigate to /services/trading/alerts. No dead buttons.

4.4.note: Human check: clicking alert row navigates to alerts page.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.8.note: Human check: overflow-auto on root div.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies that generate alerts. Widget shows critical/high/medium alerts from any strategy type. Relevant to risk-monitoring for all DeFi, CeFi, TradFi strategies.

l6.notes: Not started — L6 (tests) deferred to subsequent pass.

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches in AlertsPreviewWidget section. text-rose-400, text-amber-400, text-sky-400 are Tailwind classes, not raw hex.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: AlertsPreviewWidget is ~50 lines within bottom-widgets.tsx (188 total). Well under limits.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in AlertsPreviewWidget. No unstable deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: AlertsPreviewWidget uses text-[9px] at lines 79 for Badge severity chip. No sub-12px token exists in globals.css. Requests --text-badge-nano (0.5625rem/9px).
8.1.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-badge-nano (9px) for compact badge chip labels

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Spinner, Link from shared primitives.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt. Alert row is wrapped in (proper anchor). Badge has no interactive role needed. Human: keyboard-only walkthrough pending.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (missing badge-nano token). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4 partial. 8.5 human-only.

keepSeparate.rationale: alerts-preview is a compact preview panel; full alert management belongs on the dedicated alerts page.

relationships.notes: Displays top 4 alerts from scope. Links to full alerts page.

dataContract.notes: Alerts fetched via useAlerts() hook in context producer. mockAlerts field in OverviewData is either API alerts or mock fallback.

gaps: Alert scope filtering (by strategy) not verified with real API
Medium/low severity alerts shown in preview but truncated at top-4
coverage.notes: Alert preview is strategy-agnostic; shows top 4 alerts across all active strategies in scope.

findings.description: AlertsPreviewWidget — ~3 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bottom-widgets.tsx:79 — text-[9px] on Badge severity chip in AlertsPreviewWidget
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-badge-nano (0.5625rem/9px) for compact severity badge chip labels
